clusters.justification: These terms co-activate within cortico-subcortical affective circuits that are broadly responsible for processing valenced stimuli, visceral states, and emotional reactivity.
These terms converge functionally on dopaminergic-striatal-prefrontal pathways dedicated to computing expected value, evaluating outcomes, and driving goal-directed behavior.
These terms map onto default mode cortical architectures that subserve the internally directed representation of agents, linking self-projection, autobiographical memory, and understanding others.
